title: lobelia dortmanna
intro: Lobelia dortmanna, also known as water lobelia or water puccoon, is a perennial aquatic plant native to North America, typically found in shallow water or saturated soils. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which can help to alleviate respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. The health benefits of Lobelia dortmanna include its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and are often used to treat respiratory issues, as well as to promote relaxation and reduce inflammation.
